languages.text: "Отступайте во дворец и держите оборону! Сейчас же!"

traits.locale_text: "Отступайте во дворец и держите оборону! Сейчас же!"

languages.text: "Retreat to the palace and hold the defences! Now!"
languages.original_text: "Отступайте во дворец и держите оборону! Сейчас же!"

traits.locale_text: "Retreat to the palace and hold the defences! Now!"
"Retreat to the palace and hold the defences! Now!"
"Retreat to the palace and hold the defences! Now!"

languages.text: "Zieht Euch zum Palast zurück und haltet die Stellung! Jetzt!"
languages.original_text: "Retreat to the palace and hold the defences! Now!"

traits.locale_text: "Zieht Euch zum Palast zurück und haltet die Stellung! Jetzt!"

languages.text: “撤回宫殿，守住防线！立即执行！”
languages.original_text: "Retreat to the palace and hold the defences! Now!"

traits.locale_text: “撤回宫殿，守住防线！立即执行！”

languages.text: « Repliez-vous dans le palais et tenez les défenses, et que ça saute ! »
languages.original_text: "Retreat to the palace and hold the defences! Now!"

traits.locale_text: « Repliez-vous dans le palais et tenez les défenses, et que ça saute ! »

languages.text: «¡Retiraos al palacio y apostaos en las defensas! ¡Ya!».
languages.original_text: "Retreat to the palace and hold the defences! Now!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Retiraos al palacio y apostaos en las defensas! ¡Ya!».

languages.text: "Saraya geri çekilin ve savunmayı tutun! Şimdi!"
languages.original_text: "Retreat to the palace and hold the defences! Now!"

traits.locale_text: "Saraya geri çekilin ve savunmayı tutun! Şimdi!"

languages.text: 「宮殿に退却し、防衛を固めろ！今すぐ！」
languages.original_text: "Retreat to the palace and hold the defences! Now!"

traits.locale_text: 「宮殿に退却し、防衛を固めろ！今すぐ！」
